seoTitle: Lorne vs Lovely Banks — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lorne and Lovely Banks. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lorne vs Lovely Banks: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lorne and Lovely Banks.
heading: Lorne vs Lovely Banks — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lorne, Victoria and Lovely Banks, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lovely Banks has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Lorne (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lorne or Lovely Banks safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lorne has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Lovely Banks scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lorne scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Lovely Banks scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lorne or Lovely Banks?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lovely Banks has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
